title: 1981-04-16_Pat_187.txt
key_claims: Dick models 3-74 as the receipt of two signals: "Signal A" is the normal 4D Black Iron Prison, and "Signal B" is the superimposed 5D Palm Tree Garden. Most people only receive Signal A, leaving them blind.

Higher lifeforms (the "Fairies" or 5D entities) can receive both signals. Because humans are blind to Signal B, these entities can freely use human commercial media (Signal A) as a carrier wave to encode and transmit Signal B information, fully camouflaged.
Dick speculates that "Thomas" (the entity who possessed him) was neither human nor God, but one of these extraterrestrial/extradimensional 5D "fairies" who move through time like space.
The New Testament/Acts narrative is not a literal history of Jesus, but rather the encryption code used by these entities to communicate across the Signal A/Signal B overlap.
recurring_concepts: **Signal A vs Signal B**: The binary information streams. Signal A operates deterministically (Empire), while Signal B introduces providence and order (Ma'at/VALIS).
reading_excerpt: Dick models 3-74 as the receipt of two signals: "Signal A" is the normal 4D Black Iron Prison, and "Signal B" is the superimposed 5D Palm Tree Garden. Most people only receive Signal A, leaving them blind.
